title: coreopsis cajamarcana
intro: Coreopsis cajamarcana, also known as the Peruvian coreopsis, is a flowering plant native to the highlands of Peru, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Coreopsis cajamarcana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial activities. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis cajamarcana can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
